label: cache proof • hybrid-SSM hosts must show companion-cache hits, not just KV
query: Explain in two sentences why tides happen twice a day.
notes: The hybrid-specific pin from AGENTS.md: 'Qwen-style hybrid SSM needs KV plus SSM companion rederive/hit proof; a KV hit alone is not enough.' The explicit minSsmCompanionHitsDelta floor is scored on hybrid hosts and skipped-with-note on full-attention hosts (the counter can never move there), so the same case file is honest on both topologies. Off-CI (needs a local model).

followUpTurns: And why are some tides higher than others?
